articles.title: Men's Premier League open strong against the Hawks
articles.excerpt: A dominant second half sees the first grade take the season opener 3–1 at home, setting the tone for a big year ahead.
articles.body: The men's Premier League side started the 2026 season in convincing fashion, defeating Hawthorn HC 3–1 at Mentone Hockey Ground on Saturday afternoon. After a tight first half, Mentone came alive after the break with three unanswered goals. The win puts the Panthers at the top of the early ladder heading into round two.

articles.title: Record 160 kids register for Hook in2 Hockey
articles.excerpt: The club's entry program hits record numbers as Bayside families embrace hockey — and the future Juniors pipeline looks healthy.
articles.body: Mentone Hockey Club is thrilled to announce that 160 children have registered for the 2026 Hook in2 Hockey program — the largest cohort in the club's history. Sessions run every Thursday 5:15–6:00pm at Mentone Hockey Ground. If your child missed registration, contact hookin2hockey@mentonehockey.org.au — there may still be spots available.

articles.title: Three Mentone players named in Hockey Vic squad
articles.excerpt: Congratulations to our three Premier League women selected for state representation — a proud moment for the club.
articles.body: Three members of Mentone's Premier League women's side have been named in the Hockey Victoria representative squad for the 2026 state championships. The club extends its congratulations to all three players on this well-deserved recognition. It reflects the quality of the women's program and the hard work put in over the preseason.

articles.title: Preseason wraps up — Panthers ready for 2026
articles.excerpt: Both senior sections completed their preseason programs with strong performances across the board. Here's a look at how it went.
articles.body: With the 2026 season now underway, we look back at a productive preseason across both the men's and women's sections. Training numbers were up across the board, and the new coaching appointments have brought fresh energy to both programs. Special mention to the club's new strength and conditioning program, which ran for the first time this year.

articles.title: Masters section set for strong 2026 campaign
articles.excerpt: New faces and returning favourites — the Masters groups are shaping up well ahead of the season.
articles.body: The Masters sections head into 2026 with renewed enthusiasm. The Men's O40 and O50 groups have welcomed several new players, while the Women's O45 side returns largely intact from a strong 2025 campaign. Masters training runs Tuesday and Thursday evenings alongside the senior squads at Mentone Hockey Ground.

articles.title: 2026 season registrations now open
articles.excerpt: All sections are open for registration. Get in early — some grades fill quickly.
articles.body: Registrations for the 2026 winter season are now open across all sections — Men's, Women's, Juniors, Masters and Hook in2 Hockey. Register online via the club portal. If you're new to the club or unsure which section is right for you, get in touch with the relevant coordinator or come along to training first.
